definition: Forward-link line connecting bhava and jāti.
notes: Use this record for the whole line. It carries the repository's updated cluster decision to keep birth as the chain default for jāti while allowing rebirth as a controlled alternate only when a narrower local frame requires it. The Buddhadasa usage profile supports keeping jāti open to practical and immediate readings in dependent-arising translation.

context_rules.context: When the local doctrinal frame is explicitly using rebirth as a controlled alternate for jāti
context_rules.notes: Use only when the surrounding passage clearly warrants the narrower reading.

authority_basis.scope: Supports keeping jāti open to practical and immediate readings in dependent-arising translation.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the standard line linking bhava and jāti in the forward chain.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not force rebirth into the line unless the local doctrinal frame clearly requires it.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the line from hardening into an automatic rebirth reading.
